titlestmt.titleproper: United States Mint errors and misprints (coins and paper)8491
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-03-10 18:26:53 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: United States Mint errors and misprints (coins and paper)
did.physdesc: Coins.
did.abstract: Coin and paper money US misprints.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Coin and paper money US misprints.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: United States Mint Errors and Misprints, #8491. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to permission of the curator.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Researchers may view one folder at a time.

did.physdesc: Struck 15% off center Graded: SEGS graded Mint State 65
Broadstruck Graded: Choice
Broadstruck Graded: Choice
Missing the clad layer on the back Graded: NGC Graded MS 63
Broadstruck with Zinc profile
Struck 70%off center
Struck50% off center
Double Strike to both sides
Struck 75% off center
Struck 20% off center Graded: NGC MS 65
Face slightly off center
Penny on dime planchet Graded: PCGS MS 64 Mint
Broadstruck south of center
Struck 25% off center, rims are missing, no reeding to edges
Double strike. Second strike 100% off center
Struck 95% off center
Quarter struck on nickel planchet Graded: MGN AU 55
Struck 10% off center on a triple clipped planchet Graded: NGC MS 64
Second strike 90% off center Graded: PCGS
Reverse Brockage Graded: ANACS AU 55
Struck 45% off center Graded: Fine
Struck on a penny planchet
Double die Graded: NGC Graded AU 55 BN about uncirculated
Accented hair Graded: PCGS PR 65
Overstruck with full mirror brockage from reverse of dye, overstrike rotated 180 degrees from front strike Graded: PCGS MS 64 RD
Double Struck, broadstruck and indented Graded: PCGS MS 63 RD
Obverse struck through capped die Graded: NGC MS 63 RB
Top 100 double stars, VAM 15 Graded: PCGS MS 64
Struck on a ten cent planchet Graded: NGC graded VF
Extra leaf high Graded: NGC graded MS 66
Double strike, one small one large Graded: Near fine
Double strike Graded: Near fine
Plain edge, all edge lettering is missing Graded: Brilliant UNC
Plain edge, all edge letter is missing Graded: MS 65
One with inverted edge lettering, one with overlapped edge lettering
Last "Godless" dollar error coin, missing edge lettering Graded: PCGS MS 65
Four "In God We Trust" presidential dollars--Harrison, Tyler, Polk and Taylor--missing edge lettering Graded: Brilliant uncirculated
Experimental rinse caused color change Graded: PCGS MS 66
First Sacagawea error coin, missing edge lettering Graded: PCGS MS 65
Second Sacagawea error coin, missing edge lettering Graded: PCGS MS 64
Eight tail feather and seven tail feather varieties Graded: Circulated

did.unittitle: One cent, five cent, ten cent
did.physdesc: Error coin folio, coins struck off-center Graded: Uncirculated

did.unittitle: Illinois, Maine and Missouri State Quarters
did.physdesc: Mint cancelled errors Graded: Brilliant uncirculated
Serial numbers and seals on the back Graded: Gem crisp
Insufficient ink on the back plus green ink line in right margin of the back Graded: Choice
Alignment error plus shift of the serial numbers most visibly on the left side Graded: Choice AU
Gutter folds on face and back Graded: PCGS 45 PPQ extremely fine
Ink smears on the back Graded: PCGS 40 PPG extremely fine
Drawn on Notes is Sailor "Popeye" original sketch by Hy Eisman.
Misaligned back printing
Seals and serial numbers shifted to the right
Seals and serial numbers inverted
Full back to face offset
Misplaced seal on left hand side
Mismatched serial numbers Graded: PCGS 65 PPQ Gem
Missing both seals and serial numbers as well as the series and signature printings Graded: PCGS 64 PPQ very choice
Full face to back offset Graded: PCGS 63 PPQ choice
Missing back printing Graded: PCGS 58 PPQ choice
Printed foldover Graded: PCGS 63 PPQ choice
Missing seals and serial numbers on front
Magnetic ink skips
Blank corner on upper left on the back
Seals and serial numbers shifted upwards
Ink transfer error to front lower right
Insufficient ink to back
Missing serial numbers and one seal
Green ink smear on back plus Bureau of Printing and Engraving red rejection mark on front Graded: PCGS 66 PPQ gem
Ink transfer error to front lower right
Offset printing, two bills visible on face, seals and serial numbers are not centered
Gutter fold to lower left corner
Partial face to back offset Graded: PCGS 58 PPQ choice
Too much ink on back
Pre-face print foldover, folded lower corner Graded: PCGS 35 PPQ very fine
Series 1969 B Full back to front wet ink transfer with inspector's red rejection mark on face
Entire face is blank except for seals and serial numbers Graded: PMG 66 EPQ gem
Full face to back offset Graded: PMG 58 EPQ choice
Green ink smear on back
Green ink smear on back
Star note, green ink smear on back Graded: PCGS 66 PPQ gem
Serial numbers and seals are low, also shows Bureau's red rejection mark on face
Seal on left hand side is low Graded:
Gutter fold down center on face
Butterfly lower right hand side of face
Pre face print foldover
Missing seal Graded: PMG 58 EPQ
Missing right serial number, treasury seal, series year and treasury secretary signature
Insufficient ink on face Graded:PMG 55 EPQ
Inverted back, plate letter C Graded: FR 1528 VF
Solvent smear on face Graded: PCGS 64 PPQ very choice new
End of roll error Graded: PCGS 63 PPQ Choice new
Overinked black overprint of district seal Graded: PCGS 40 PPQ extremely fine
Partial offsets on face and back Graded: PCGS 58 PPQ choice about new
Partial multiple back printing, ink on back soaked through from front Graded: PCGS FR 2028A choice about new 55
Seal and numbers on left side show dramatic shift downward Graded: PMG choice uncirculated 63 EPQ
Obstructed printing error caused by stray sheet, missing about 40% of face printing Graded: PMG choice about uncirculated 58 EPQ
Back is perfectly centered while face is shifted about 1/2 inch Graded: PCGS choice about new 58
Full face to back offset printing Graded: PCGS extremely fine 45 PPQ FR 2168B
Partial face to back offset printing, large portrait Graded: PMG choice very fine 35 FR 2083 A
Cutting error--3 items Graded: Uncirculated
Dramatic cutting error--3 items Graded: Uncirculated
Partial back to face offset printing Graded: PCGS very fine apparent FR 1973 L
Printed foldover, treasury seals and serial numbers (one only partial) appear on back. From the Arden collection Graded: PCGS choice about new 58 PPQ FR 2168 J
Gutter fold error plus cutting error Graded: Almost uncirculated
Board break Graded: EF-AU
Double printed back Graded: Fine
A piece of rag might have caused smear on face Graded: AU
